_comment: Single source of truth for model + hardware-tier facts. Code (local backend, connection/tier check) and the README hardware-tiers table derive from this file. Update here, not in code or docs. The 8GB FLUX.1 set was verified end-to-end in Step 8; video + FLUX.2 entries are marked verified:false until Steps 10-12 exercise them.

models.name: FLUX.1 dev (GGUF Q4_K_S)
models.notes: Local 8GB image base. Load via UnetLoaderGGUF. FLUX.1 has no native multi-reference, so multiref/2+ routes to cloud or 16GB+.

models.name: T5-XXL encoder (GGUF Q5_K_M)
models.notes: Quantized T5 for FLUX.1. NOT the fp16 (~9GB) which blows the 8GB budget. Load via DualCLIPLoaderGGUF (type flux) alongside clip_l.

models.name: CLIP-L text encoder
models.notes: FLUX is dual-encoder: CLIP-L + T5. Required second encoder.

models.name: FLUX.1 VAE (ae.safetensors)
models.notes: Ungated Comfy-Org mirror of the FLUX.1 VAE (byte-exact 335,304,388). The official Black Forest Labs FLUX.1 repos gate the VAE behind a login.

models.name: LTX-Video 2B distilled (image-to-video)
models.notes: Local 8GB image-to-video. Native ComfyUI LTXV nodes (no custom node). Checkpoint bundles the VAE; reuses the FLUX T5 GGUF via CLIPLoader type ltxv. Verified end-to-end in Step 11 (still->animate, 512x320, 49 frames, ~24s).

models.name: Wan 2.2 1.3B (image-to-video, photoreal)
models.notes: Low-res photoreal i2v that fits 8GB. Weights from the Wan-AI HF org; node pack kijai/ComfyUI-WanVideoWrapper. Confirm repo/filename at Step 11.

models.name: Wan 2.2 14B (image-to-video, photoreal)
models.notes: Full photoreal i2v; wants 16GB+ (12GB with patience). Weights from the Wan-AI HF org; node pack kijai/ComfyUI-WanVideoWrapper. Confirm repo/filename at Step 11.

models.name: FLUX.2 dev (FP8)
models.notes: Cloud/16GB+ image base. The only path with native multi-reference (group scenes, untrained solo). Needs companion Mistral encoder + flux2 VAE from Comfy-Org/flux2-dev. Default for the 8GB tier's multiref/2+ via the cloud backend.

tiers.label: 8GB (e.g. RTX 3070)
tiers.notes: FLUX.1 local; FLUX.2 + multi-reference (2+ chars) need cloud or 16GB+.

tiers.label: Cloud (any hardware)
tiers.notes: BYOK; FLUX.2 image/training, cloud video (Kling/Veo/Runway). No Sora.
